name: Maple Barbecued Caribou Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-metal bowl, combine all ingredients except the ribs and pepper.
2. Blend well to mix everything thoroughly.
3. Marinate the ribs overnight.
4. Preheat the oven to 325°F (160°C).
5. Remove the ribs from the marinade and drain them on paper towels.
6. Sprinkle the ribs with pepper.
7. Place the ribs in a 5-quart roasting pan in a double layer.
8. Roast for 1 hour.
9. Pour sauce over the ribs.
10. Increase the heat to 350°F (175°C) and bake until the ribs begin to char on top, about 1 1/2 hours.
11. Turn the ribs over, cover the pan, and bake for an additional 30 minutes, or until the ribs are tender and the sauce is thick.
12. Serve the ribs on a platter with the sauce in a gravy boat on the side.
